case_title: DILIP M. PATEL VS. DEAH MARIE

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT MARIE, DEAH

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, DILIP M. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARIE, DEAH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: DEFENDANT VACATED ON 6/5/07, $1,250.00 RENT, $370.00 COSTS, $2,463.99 HOLDOVER DAMAGES,, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,083.99, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $35.71 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, DILIP M.
AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $370.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MARIE, DEAH
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, DILIP M. AS TO DEFENDANT MARIE, DEAH SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MARIE, DEAH
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT MARIE, DEAH

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, DILIP M. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARIE, DEAH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 310 COLUMBUS AVE. #201, S.F. CA. 94133, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
